intent: Write a piece on 'how /f/dataisbeautiful conversations compare to the formal concepts in their underlying topics'. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) Reddit — browse /f/dataisbeautiful AND /f/science for at least 3 posts whose charts reference a specific measurable concept (demographics, economics, sports stats, etc.). Collect title, score, comment count, and the concept each chart surfaces. (2) Wikipedia — open the article on each underlying concept and extract 2-3 facts about how the concept is measured or defined. The report must: (a) present each Reddit chart theme, (b) compare the community commentary to the Wikipedia definition, (c) note one case where the chart likely misleads and one where it illuminates, (d) close with tips for reading data posts critically. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Reddit (dataisbeautiful + science) + Wikipedia. Chart-concept alignment analysis.
